{{Infobox group
| name = Watchmen
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Watchmen Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Watchmen are members of a disciplined and regimented order known as the [[Blackwatch]]. Identified by their distinctive black uniforms, often featuring silver buttons, they serve as a specialized force within the [[Empire]]. While some view them as reclusive or shady figures, they are officially sworn to protect humanity from incomprehensible and unspeakable threats. Their authority is significant, as they are reputed to hold power even over [[Elders]], and common citizens often avoid them out of fear or deference. The order was established by a woman who chose the title to avoid appearing superior to her male peers. Members of the [[Blackwatch]] have been involved in various high-stakes operations, such as mining for a [[Heart]] on [[Nakothi's island]] in an attempt to achieve eternal [[life]]. Their duties can range from combat and guarding to performing grim tasks like manual excavation in biological environments. While some suspect they may be acolytes of the [[Elders]] or tools used by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to install disposable rulers, others maintain they are essential guardians standing between the public and supernatural dangers.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Six [[Watchmen]] wearing black coats are working around the heart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Watchmen]] are guardians who stand in the gap between normal people and unspeakable threats.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Watchmen]] are mining a crater on the [[island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Six [[Watchmen]] were digging at [[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Watchmen]] aim to produce a series of disposable [[Emperors]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Bliss]] summoned [[Watchmen]] to secure the courtyard.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Watchmen]] were wounded in the courtyard.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The assassin killed two [[Watchmen]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|There are [[Watchmen]] in the palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Watchmen]] were traitorous on [[Nakothi's island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Watchmen]] are tending to the injured in the surgery.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Watchmen]] used to man the fort on the [[island]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
